name: Hunan Xiangjia Animal Husbandry Co.,Ltd
summary: Hunan Xiangjia Animal Husbandry Co.,Ltd offers poultry breeding, slaughtering, and processing services. It produces poultry feed and biological fertilizers. The company also offers cold meat products, such as duck soup and intestines and chicken breast, legs, thighs, and wings. It was formerly known as Hunan Shuangjia Agriculture and Animal Husbandry Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hunan Xiangjia Animal Husbandry Co.,Ltd in June, 2012. Hunan Xiangjia Animal Husbandry Co.,Ltd company was founded in 1994 and is based in Changde, China.
